en-US.meta_description: Press kit for 40 Below with screenshots, icons, download bundles, and direct promo-code contact information.
en-US.title: 40 Below Press Kit
en-US.lead: Everything you need to cover 40 Below, including screenshots, app icons, and email for promo-code requests.
en-US.overview_outro: This press kit gathers everything you need to cover 40 Below, but if you have any other questions or need anything else, just use the email link at the bottom of this page to shoot me a note. I'll get right back to you. Thanks for taking a look!
en-US.factsheet_intro: A quick App Store-style snapshot for press coverage.

factsheet_store.technology_value: Built with the latest Apple technology

en-US.contact_body: Email {email} if you would like a promo code or have a press question about 40 Below.
en-US.contact_body_prefill: Hi Michael,%0A%0AI'd like a promo code or more information for coverage of 40 Below.%0A%0AThanks!
en-US.download_note: Each zip includes app icons plus a short inventory note. iPad and Mac bundles are ready for future screenshots.
en-US.technology_heading: Chock Full of Apple Technology and Built With Purpose
en-US.technology_intro: 40 Below was built with the latest and greatest Apple frameworks and technologies. Mac and iOS were each considered thoughtfully to ensure 40 Below feels right at home and behaves like it should - not like a port that simply checks a box.
technology_bullets: Uses Apple’s own WeatherKit framework for timely, hyperlocal weather information.
Efficiently keeps itself up to date in the background so the latest temperature information is always available.

Integrates with Siri, Spotlight, and Shortcuts. Supports screen-free workflows whether your phone is in your pocket or connected to CarPlay. “Hey Siri, what’s the weather in 40 Below?” will give you local conditions in both Fahrenheit and Celsius.
40 Below for macOS can run in the background as a menu bar app and will start at login, so it’s always there when you need it.
Fully localized into 17 languages, with locale-aware layout: depending on your locale, 40 Below will prioritize Fahrenheit or Celsius in the UI.
Full accessibility support including VoiceOver navigation, Dynamic Type for increased text sizes, and high contrast and reduced motion support.

40 Below for Mac and 40 Below for iOS share a common codebase, but each one is designed and purpose-built for their respective platforms, meaning you can expect a Mac app experience on Mac, and an iOS experience on your mobile devices.
en-US.gallery_intro: Preview the available press images by platform. iPad and Mac sections are set up now and waiting for approved screenshots.
en-US.empty_state_body: This gallery is wired up and ready for the first approved screenshots.
